response.original_title: Can I use Zelle with PayPal?
response.overview: Can I use Zelle with PayPal? To use +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) Zelle with PayPal, you must understand that these are two separate and competing peer-to-peer payment networks that do not have a direct integration. There is +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) no "link" button that allows you to move funds directly from a Zelle interface into a PayPal balance. However, you can create a functional bridge +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) between them by using a shared bank
